item.title: What Happened Today #54
item.description: They’re not even pretending anymore. From gutting COVID funds to targeting judges, deporting protesters, and silencing scientists, Trump and his allies are rewriting the rules—fast. His administration is rewarding violent rioters, dismantling public health, and dragging the U.S. into a chaos spiral powered by lies, crypto enriching him and his family, and revenge. The April 5 Day of Action is a line in the sand. The main protest is in D.C.—but local events are happening nationwide. Wichita, Peoria, wherever you are: you’re in this. Meanwhile, get the headlines daily so you don't miss anything: https://govbrief.today Then show the hell up. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/25/trump-signal-group-chat-waltz-hegseth-updates/82649700007/ 2. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/trump-signs-executive-order-requiring-proof-citizenship-register-vote-rcna198094 3. https://arstechnica.com/health/2025/03/cdc-rocked-by-top-level-departures-loss-of-11-4b-in-covid-funding/ 4. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/25/trumps-world-liberty-financial-jumps-into-stablecoin-game-with-usd1-reveal.html 5. https://www.kgw.com/article/news/local/education-department-launches-investigation-portland-public-schools-targeting-trans-athletes/283-0172769f-1d96-42fb-b4ce-bcb28ed14e76 6. https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/mar/25/danish-pm-mette-frederiksen-condemns-us-pressure-greenland-visit 7. https://apnews.com/article/elections-rnc-trump-misinformation-voter-files-d483ed9a67a7816a3c77231f7ccf885d 8. https://abcnews.go.com/US/trumps-lawyer-eric-adams-criminal-case/story?id=120152531 9. https://www.houstonchronicle.com/news/politics/article/trump-nominates-republican-once-accused-of-20240119.php 10. https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/25/social-security-nominee-frank-bisignano-grilled-on-doge/82636973007/ 11. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5213311-trump-order-mueller-prosecutor-law-firm/ 12. https://www.washingtonpost.com/health/2025/03/25/vaccine-skeptic-hhs-rfk-immunization-autism/ 13. https://www.start.umd.edu/news/statement-cancellation-t2v 14. https://www.cnn.com/2025/03/25/media/judge-bars-trump-radio-free-europe/index.html 15. https://www.nbcnewyork.com/news/local/columbia-student-protester-yunseo-chung-cant-be-detained-judge-rules-during-deportation-fight/6199991/ 16. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-03-25/fhfa-chief-ends-program-designed-to-help-first-time-homebuyers 17. https://www.wired.com/story/nist-doge-layoffs-atomic-spectroscopy/ 18. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/speaker-mike-johnson-floats-eliminating-federal-courts-rcna197986 19. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/25/trump-floats-possibility-of-compensation-for-jan-6-rioters-00250063 20. https://handsoff2025.com/

item.title: My old man crossed the rainbow bridge today.
item.description: He was getting sicker and could barely walk, until recently he stopped walking all together. We took him to the vet and well he's not suffering anymore. I'm still unsure how to handle this, I've lost pets before but this is the first time I was able to be there with him till the end. I don't regret it but my heart aches. I still had to go to work today but everything feels numb, and it's taking all my effort to not cry. I'll see you again someday Sebastian.
item.dc:creator: Dragonspiller

item.description: So I started a new job the other day and mentioned I was trans fem. She's a little old lady and could have easily gone the other direction. But she started me to other coworkers as my fem name. Then, when I showed up today, I found out she made a whole playlist to put over the speaker system. Some of the songs included Born this Way, She Works Hard for the Money, and The Village by Wrabel. I can't say what it means to me and I'm glad to have an ally in an otherwise trans-hostile city. Edit: Sorry about the title, it was supposed to be an emoji.
item.dc:creator: Nerdy0ne

item.title: Who has two thumbs and nearly got scammed? This gal!
item.description:
So yeah, skipping to the moral before the story: be freaking cautious! I regularly keep an eye open on eBay, Marketplace, and estate sale sites for the next potential cash register to restore, so I inevitably bumped into this listing. Obviously, it's a wreck. A brass register painted silver, which is bad enough, but also which looks poorly cared for even after the fact. So... why not see how low they might come down from the $500 they want?
I offered $250 almost as a joke, but they immediately said okay. So... potential red flag, but it could also be good fortune. The listing lacks detail, only has two photos, and reeks of low effort. Maybe they just want to be rid of the thing. So we arrange a day for me to come get it and I figure the two hour drive one way will be worth it because this isn't a model I've seen before. Might teach me something!
Then I noticed the back looked off. Like... there's no back panel at all. Since there's only a front and side photo I can't tell if it's missing or just inset weird, so I start asking about it. The guy says he's busy, he'll get a photo the next day, but never says whether the back plate is there. Just dodges the question and I get the sense he's stalling until I show up to pay for it. So I let him know I'm backing out if there's no panel. Things are feeling suspicious and I'm not driving two hours one way after work to get scheistered. At this, he relents and says the panel *is* there, no worries. Come on down. I tell him I'll wait for the photo. He finally sends this:
Sigh. Classic NCR sheet metal, hard to find, ooh la la. I dropped the offer and ducked outta the chat. At $250 it's probably worth getting, dollar wise, but I wasn't going to go all that way to buy a register from someone who went through pains to hide something so glaring. I may be a pervert but I'm a pervert with principles. I'm just glad I caught it before making the trip. If I'd shown up and seen that, I would've raised some hell and been pissed for days. Be careful out there, folks. :(
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.description: 1. Gabor Maté Talks on Addiction, Trauma, and Healing https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=gabor+mat%C3%A9 2. The Wisdom of Trauma (Documentary) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7zjTVwYQY3E 3. Gabor Maté on ADHD, Addiction, and the Connection to Trauma https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=42soGyd3Cz0 4. Dr. Gabor Maté on Compassion and Healing https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e3wJt8VgrH4 5. In the Realm of Hungry Ghosts – Gabor Maté Interview https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=slQ1M9UwtoM Disclaimer: Dr. Maté’s approaches have helped many, but some theories or methods, particularly related to unconventional treatments, should be approached with caution. Professional consultation is advised when considering any new practices. Dear Imgurians, I sincerely thank you for your lovely messages. I am not a superhero, but I truly appreciate your kind words. My goal is simply to share content that might be useful to you—mostly things that bring laughter. I am not trying to be anyone special in any way, but if something I post makes a difference in your life, I am deeply grateful. Knowing that I can bring even a small bit of joy or positivity to your day means the world to me. Thank you for being here.
item.dc:creator: Multipass
